englishDefinitions: (idiomatic) To cease or fail at a regimen of self-improvement or reform; to lapse back into an old habit or addiction.
persianTranslation: (اصطلاحاً) توقف یا شکست در یک رژیم خود-بهبود یا اصلاح؛ بازگشت به عادت یا اعتیاد قدیمی
examples: Though he fell off the wagon several times, he eventually succeeded in quitting.
